Secure Your 2026 Passport
Events

Show Up. Experience Something New.

FFP organises and curates events for passport holders throughout the year. Free or heavily subsidised. You just show up.

🏟️
Premiere Sessions
Every time FFP onboards a new partner, we host a free premiere event. Passport holders attend, experience the venue, meet each other. First in, completely free.
🌿
Community Events
Group hikes, sunrise runs, beach workouts, healthy brunches, recovery mornings. Organised by FFP and hosted across the UAE. Open to all passport holders.
🧪
Product Trials & Sampling
Top UAE wellness and fitness brands invite passport holders to trial new products, attend launch events and sample before public release.
Find fit people. Train together. Go further.
THE FFP COMMUNITY
Experiences

Group Trips. Real Adventures. Go Together.

FFP curates multi-day group experiences for passport holders. Overseas trips, inbound events and sporting adventures — book a spot, go as a group.

Overseas
International Trips
Surf weekends in Sri Lanka, rugby in Sydney, tennis in Melbourne, football in London. FFP organises the trip — passport holders book their spot and travel as a group.
Inbound
Experiences Coming to the UAE
International sporting events, fitness conventions and wellness retreats landing in Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Passport holders get access and group rates.
Local
UAE Multi-Day Adventures
Desert camping, mountain hiking, overnight sail trips, Jebel Jais adventures. Right here in the UAE — with people who are as into it as you are.

Experiences are separately priced. 25% deposit to secure your spot.

The more you move, the more your passport gives back.
ACTIVE EVERY DAY
Deals

2-for-1 at Hundreds of UAE Venues.

Pay for yourself — your guest gets in free. Every FFP partner offers the same deal. No confusing tiers, no restrictions.

🏋️
Fitness
Gyms, group training, CrossFit, HIIT, strength studios.
🧘

🧊

Real effort. Real prizes. Real community.
PUSH YOUR LIMITS
Challenges

Compete. Get on the Board. Win Prizes.

Two types of challenges — both with live leaderboards and real prizes for the people who earn them.

Provider Challenges
Prizes from partners
Head to a partner venue — Forge Fitness, Dubai Longevity Centre, and others. Show your QR, staff log your attempt on site. Pull-up records, sprint times, ice bath totals. Your score goes on a live leaderboard. Top 3 win gym passes, free sessions and more.
FFP Challenges
Up to AED 1,000 cash
Submit from anywhere — max push-ups in 60 seconds, fastest 500m row, most active days in a month. Upload your video proof and appear on the global leaderboard. Winners verified by FFP before prizes are paid out.
Match, connect and go do things together.
FIND YOUR PEOPLE
Meet & Move

Find Your People. Train Together.

The FFP app matches you with passport holders near you based on your sports, fitness level, age and area. Connect, organise meetups, build your crew.

🤝
Get Matched
View profiles of passport holders who match your interests, location and activity level. Connect mutually — no cold outreach.
📍
Organise Meetups
Create a group session — a run, a padel game, a gym session, a hike. Set the time, location and who you want. Your matches get notified.
📊
Track & Rank
Log your active days, track your fitness stats — biological age, strength, VO2 max — and see how you rank against passport holders in your city.
Active people who earn while they live it.
LIVE THE LIFESTYLE
Ambassador Programme

The FFP Ambassador Programme.

Every passport holder earns. Ambassadors earn significantly more — enough to fund their entire active lifestyle.

Refer a Friend
Share your code. When they sign up, you both get credit.
AED 25
Active Minutes
Log your training. Earn 1 point per minute. Redeem as credit.
1pt/min
★ FFP Ambassador
Earn While You Live It
Ambassadors earn AED 50 per referral, kickbacks from partner visits, commissions on experience bookings and more. Genuinely active passport holders who bring friends, attend events and connect with the community can earn enough to cover memberships, trips and their entire active lifestyle.
Earned by living the lifestyle — not just selling it. 32 points across 8 categories to unlock.
